data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- GOFO/
data.description: GOFO has announced its 2026 North American Expansion Plan, leveraging Automation and Network Intelligence for growth. The news was released on 08-Apr-2026. An incorrect map was initially shared as an image in the press release, and the revised version with accurate information is now available.

data.title: E.G. Morse to Join Ares as Head of Asia Credit and Dinesh Goel and Gabriel Fong Appointed as Co-Heads of the Asia Special Situations Strategy
data.description: Ares Management Corporation revealed today the addition of E.G. Morse as Partner and Head of Asia Credit. Mr. Morse, formerly Co-Head of China and Head of China Global Markets at Goldman Sachs Group, Inc., will take on his new role at Ares. Additionally, Dinesh Goel and Gabriel Fong have been appointed as Co-Heads of the Asia Special Situations strategy. Ares, a prominent global alternative investment manager trading on NYSE under ARES, is making strategic moves in the Asian market with these key appointments.
Nikkei extends decline, slipping 0.63%.

data.title: Paloma Acquisition Corp I Announces the Separate Trading of Its Class A Ordinary Shares and Warrants, Commencing on April 13, 2026
data.description: Today, on April 8, 2026, Paloma Acquisition Corp I (Nasdaq: PALOU) disclosed that starting on April 13, 2026, owners of the units from the Company's initial public offering have the option to independently trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares and warrants. The Company's units include these Ordinary Shares and Warrants, and this separation allows holders to trade them separately.

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses $72,000 following $280 million liquidation; market eyes if ‘fragile truce’ will continue after US-Iran ceasefire. BTC bears keep most positions open.
data.description: The announcement of a ceasefire between the US and Iran led to a rally in Bitcoin and global markets. Despite this, data reveals that a significant number of Bitcoin bears have yet to close their positions. This development suggests that the market remains uncertain about the future direction of BTC.
